name: Sidebar Layout
description: App shell with collapsible sidebar and main content area
details: A complete app shell layout with responsive sidebar navigation. Features mobile drawer, desktop collapse/expand, and compound component pattern for flexible composition. Includes NavItem component for navigation links with icons and badges.
instructions: Import: import AppShell, { NavItem, useSidebar } from './components/AppShell'
Use compound components: AppShell.Sidebar, AppShell.Main, AppShell.Header, etc.
patterns: <NavItem icon={...} label='Home' active /> for nav links
